title: Gasoline Consumption, Iran, 1955/56-1961/62 (World Bank, 1962)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1962 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1962_economic_development_program.pdf), Chapter 4 (Transport and Communications), Table 2, page 70 (printed page -67-). Every value was verified by rendering the exact page to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and reading the table directly off the image; pdftotext had garbled several digits (e.g. 'h25.9' for 425.9, '56h.7' for 564.7) which the image resolved unambiguously. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1962_economic_development_program.pdf — Chapter 4 (Transport and Communications), Table 2, page 70 (printed page -67-). Iranian solar calendar years (e.g. 1955/56 = 21 March 1955-20 March 1956). The 1960/61 and 1961/62 figures are labeled 'Tentative figures' in the source (footnote 1/) and are flagged as such in the 'note' column here. Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1962) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
